rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE G.R. PAUL & S.A. MOORE 2003 TRUST AS AMENDED TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Deposition Subpoena For Production Of Business Records By Kaiser Permanente
rulings.Rulings: Respondents Paula Gerhardt and Gloria Gregg's Motion to Quash is denied. Petitioner's request for the Kaiser records is directly relevant to the claims made in their Amended Petition to Determine Validity of Amendment to Trust and to Impose Constructive Trust, and for Breach of Fiduciary Duty. The prevailing party shall prepare the proposed order. Any party choosing to contest the tentative ruling shall notify the Court and opposing counsel no later than 4:00 p.m. on 9/8/2015.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE G.R. PAUL & S.A. MOORE 2003 TRUST AS AMENDED TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Separate Trial - Bifurcate
rulings.Rulings: The unopposed motion to bifurcate is granted. The prevailing party shall prepare a proposed order.
